description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a rich, dark reddish-brown finish, likely made from mahogany or cherry wood. The front features four open shelves divided by a central vertical panel, providing ample space for displaying or storing books, decor, or other items. Below the shelves, there are two cabinet doors with subtle round handles, concealing additional storage space. The sides and back are solid wood panels, giving the unit a sturdy and classic appearance. The legs are short and slightly tapered, elevating the cabinet just above the ground. The overall design is elegant and functional, suitable for use in offices, libraries, or upscale urban interiors.
description: A tall, dark reddish-brown wooden shelving unit with four open shelves and two lower cabinet doors, featuring a classic and sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves, a central divider, and two lower cabinet doors with round handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel and the depth of the unit, with no visible shelves or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a continuous, unbroken wooden panel covering the entire back of the unit.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid wood panel and overall depth.

license_info.creator_display_name: 杭州维界科技有限公司
